# Blueprint Schema

The `blueprint.yaml` is the master plan document consumed by dev-kit, test-kit, and deploy-kit.

```yaml
# blueprint.yaml — generated by plan-kit
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
aikit_version: "1.0"
generated_at: "<ISO timestamp>"
generated_by: "plan-kit"

module:
  id: "<module-id>"
  name: "<Module Name>"
  type: "greenfield | brownfield"
  version: "1.0.0"

# ─── Services ───────────────────────────────
services:
  - id: order-service
    name: "Order Service"
    technology: springboot        # springboot | fastapi | nestjs | express | django | dotnet
    language: java                # java | python | typescript | javascript | csharp
    language_version: "21"
    framework_version: "3.2"
    responsibility: "Manages order lifecycle"
    port: 8081
    scaffold_path: "aikit/outputs/design/scaffold/order-service"
    stories:
      - US-001
      - US-002
      - US-003
    api_base_path: "/api/v1/orders"
    events_produced:
      - OrderCreated
      - OrderCancelled
    events_consumed:
      - PaymentCompleted
    dependencies:
      - service: inventory-service
        type: synchronous-rest
        reason: "Check stock availability"
      - service: auth-service
        type: shared-cross-module
        cross_cutting_ref: "auth-service"
    database:
      name: orders_db
      tables:
        - orders
        - order_items
    environment:
      local:
        DATABASE_URL: "jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/orders_db"
        KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP: "localhost:9092"
      cloud_placeholder:
        DATABASE_URL: "${DB_URL}"          # Replace with actual cloud value
        KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP: "${KAFKA_URL}"

# ─── Frontend ─────────────────────────────
frontend:
  type: "spa | microfrontend | none"
  framework: "react | angular | vue"
  ui_library: "material-ui | ant-design | ..."
  scaffold_path: "aikit/outputs/design/scaffold/frontend"
  pages:
    - id: order-list-page
      route: "/orders"
      story: US-001
      ux_stub: "aikit/outputs/design/ux-stubs/order-list"
      components:
        - OrderList
        - OrderStatusBadge
    - id: create-order-page
      route: "/orders/new"
      story: US-002
      ux_stub: "aikit/outputs/design/ux-stubs/create-order"
      components:
        - CreateOrderForm
        - ProductSelector

  mfe_config:               # Only if type = microfrontend
    shell_app: "frontend-shell"
    remotes:
      - name: "orderApp"
        url: "http://localhost:3001/remoteEntry.js"
        exposes:
          - "./OrderList"
          - "./CreateOrder"

# ─── Database ─────────────────────────────
database:
  type: "postgresql | mysql | mssql | mongodb | dynamodb"
  version: "16"
  schema_file: "aikit/outputs/plan/db-schema.yaml"
  migrations_path: "aikit/outputs/design/scaffold/database/migrations"
  services:
    - service: order-service
      schema: public
      tables: [orders, order_items]

# ─── Events ───────────────────────────────
events:
  broker: "kafka | rabbitmq | sqs | pubsub | none"
  broker_version: "3.6"
  definitions:
    - name: OrderCreated
      producer: order-service
      consumers: [notification-service, inventory-service]
      payload:
        orderId: uuid
        userId: uuid
        total: decimal
      topic: "orders.created"

# ─── API Contracts ────────────────────────
api_contracts_file: "aikit/outputs/plan/api-contracts.yaml"

# ─── Story → Implementation Map ──────────
stories_map:
  - story_id: US-001
    title: "View Order List"
    service: order-service
    api_endpoints:
      - GET /api/v1/orders
    db_tables: [orders]
    frontend_page: order-list-page
    ux_stub: "aikit/outputs/design/ux-stubs/order-list"
    test_cases_dir: "aikit/outputs/test/test-cases/US-001"

# ─── Cross-Module Dependencies ────────────
dependencies:
  consumed_from_cross_cutting:
    - type: shared_api
      name: "User Authentication API"
      module_origin: auth-service
    - type: shared_data_model
      name: "User"
      module_origin: user-service

# ─── Tech Decisions ───────────────────────
tech_decisions_file: "aikit/outputs/plan/tech-decisions.yaml"

# ─── Deployment Target ────────────────────
deployment:
  cloud: "aws | gcp | azure | none"
  orchestration: "kubernetes | ecs | cloud-run | none"
  terraform_path: "aikit/outputs/deploy/terraform"
  helm_path: "aikit/outputs/deploy/helm"
```
